accurate.why: NOAA is accurate real-world context as the agency administering Magnuson-Stevens; all procedural claims match the bill.

no_hallucinations.why: The bill does not explicitly state 'NOAA must notify a requester when the spend plan has been determined to be complete' — this notification requirement is not in the bill text as written.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as establishing spend plan review procedures for fishery disaster funding.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately notes the existing 90-day disbursement rule and the new OMB concurrent review provision.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in the bill.

effective_dates.why: No explicit effective date beyond enactment; omission appropriate.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the 10-day review, completeness notification, OMB concurrent review, and 90-day funding timeline.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
